subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath stirred the ocean of existence with tempestuous winds in the Kingdom of Abhá, causing the waves to surge forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی موج بحر الامکان باریاح عاصفه فی ملکوت الابهی فقذفت الامواج
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transcendence; unknowability of God
